docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEIVA, MANUEL HEARING SET FOR JAN-22-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS CONTINUED FROM JAN-22-2015 TO FEB-05-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: A. LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MANUEL LEIVA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS OFF CALENDAR. MOVING PARTY DID NOT PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOTION OR PROOF OF SERVICE AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B. ADDITIONALLY, THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY UNDER CCP 1005(B). THE MOTION WAS FILED ON OCTOBER 24, 2014. MOVING PARTY ONLY PROVIDED 13 COURT DAYS NOTICE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by Plaintiff; Spanish interpreter, Margo Seely (#301386) is present to assist the Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice pursuant to government code section 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Continued To Mar-15-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Manuel Leiva appearing on his behalf. Spanish Court Interpreter Shannon Raintree is present to assist the Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to MAR-15-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court vacates the sanctions ordered as to self-represented Plaintiff on JUL-08-2016 and SEP-16-2015. JUDGE JOHN STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. PAUL M. CURRY, Tel No. (510) 452-1608 appearing telephonically for the moving party;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Attorney Paul M. Curry's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Plaintiff Manuel Leiva is granted. MOVING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER USING THE REQUIRED JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Continued To Feb-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MANUEL LEIVA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is continued to February 5, 2015, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/AJR)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2014 Continued To Feb-11-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MANUEL LEIVA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is Off calendar. Moving party did not provide a courtesy copy of the motion or proof of service as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Additionally, the motion is untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was filed on October 24, 2014. Moving party only provided 13 court days notice. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
